title: Zenith - Media Performance Analyst (m/w/d)
required_skills: Knowledge of performance channels (Tracking, Retargeting, Bid-Management, A/B Testing, Paid Social, Programmatic Display, SEA)
Analytics tools (Adobe Analytics, Google Analytics, Exactag)
Marketing Performance Analytics and Attribution understanding
matched_skills: Attribution and marketing performance analytics understanding
ROI-oriented analytical mindset (IPC campaign ROI measurement)
missing_skills: Adobe Analytics / Google Analytics (tools not in CV)
core_responsibilities: Performance analytics across paid social, programmatic display, SEA channels
Campaign optimization with bid management and retargeting
recommended_emphasis: Lead with attribution and marketing performance analytics understanding
Highlight A/B testing and experiment design
Frame campaign ROI measurement from IPC and Moli Media as performance channel analogue
Power BI and Looker Studio as analytics and reporting tools
Be transparent about GA/Adobe Analytics and channel-specific tools gap
